sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94949" key="skirtopo/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκιρτο-πόδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n94949.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spring-footed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Σάτυρος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>*.</sense> </entryFree>
